overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V depicting a foggy nighttime walk along a wet residential street in Los Santos. The camera follows a pedestrian in a yellow basketball jersey as they approach a street corner with an illuminated billboard, palm trees, and passing vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with palm tree median

events.description: orange sports car drives past on the road to the right
slight left curve as sidewalk follows the road bend

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet paved sidewalk next to a concrete block wall

entered.detail: tall cinder block wall with graffiti running along the left side of the sidewalk
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk median with textured bark
tall street light illuminating the foggy atmosphere with orange glow

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy nighttime residential street with wet cobblestone pavement. The camera moves forward along a sidewalk bordered by a concrete block wall on the left and palm trees on the right. An orange sports car passes by on the multi-lane road as streetlights cast reflections on the damp ground.

events.description: concrete block wall transitions to white metal fence on the left
large illuminated billboard becomes visible ahead through the fog

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk as the wall changes to a fence, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: person in yellow basketball jersey with number 10 walking ahead toward the intersection

entered.detail: white painted metal fence replacing the concrete wall along the sidewalk
large bright billboard with palm tree silhouettes visible against the night sky
wooden utility pole with posters and wires

segments.scene_description: The concrete wall gives way to a white metal fence as the camera approaches an intersection. A large illuminated billboard becomes visible through the fog ahead. A pedestrian wearing a yellow basketball jersey appears in the distance, walking in the same direction along the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with crosswalk and parked vehicles

events.description: approaching crosswalk markings on the ground, preparing to cross street
dark sedan drives past on the road from right to left

agents.ego_description: following the pedestrian in yellow jersey toward the crosswalk at the street corner

notable_agents.action: character in yellow Lakers-style jersey with number 10 walking toward the crosswalk
purple sports car parked near the corner building

entered.detail: low commercial building with illuminated entrance and red awning
bright purple sports car parked at the curb near the corner
white painted crosswalk lines on the asphalt road surface

segments.scene_description: The camera follows the pedestrian in the yellow jersey toward a street corner. A purple sports car is parked near a commercial building with a lit entrance. The crosswalk markings become visible on the asphalt as the billboard shifts to the right side of the frame. The fog persists, creating atmospheric halos around the streetlights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a foggy nighttime residential street that gradually opens up toward a brightly lit commercial intersection. It begins by gliding along a sidewalk of wet cobblestones, bordered by a concrete block wall and palm trees while an orange sports car passes through the reflective dampness of the road. As the concrete wall transitions into a white metal fence, the camera approaches an intersection where a large illuminated billboard and a pedestrian in a yellow basketball jersey emerge from the haze. The scene then shifts to follow the pedestrian toward a street corner, passing a parked purple sports car and a lit building entrance. Finally, the camera reaches the asphalt crosswalk as the billboard moves to the side of the frame, with the persistent fog creating atmospheric halos around the glowing streetlights.
